pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 14 consecutive quiet polls. No dome site changes since 2026-04-04. April 5-9 reset window expires April 9.
pipeline_status.analyst: NOTE-006 consumed (gravity dependency map produced). NOTE-007 (WGS84 audit) still pending for next analyst run. EXP-027 complete (eccentricity analysis). 54/67 globe fingerprints reviewed.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1: 56/67 WINs reviewed. Last: WIN-056 (Self-Contradicted, verdict holds, confidence 0.96). Pending: WIN-057 through WIN-067.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. 14th consecutive quiet poll. All 7 pages checked unchanged. ECM V51.0 parameters identical to baseline. 07-ai-context still 404 (known). April 5-9 reset window expires tomorrow.

internal_issues.description: VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' conflates 4 distinct failure modes: (1) data misrepresentation, (2) duplication/redundancy, (3) non-discrimination, (4) circular derivation. 23 WINs under one label implies systematic dishonesty, but many are simply non-discriminating observations.
internal_issues.rationale: Verdict taxonomy restructuring requires human editorial decision on subcategory definitions. Deferred — this is a deliberate editorial hold, not an oversight.

expansions_integrated.target: Section 2.9 (V13 Coordinate System) in data/sections.json part2
expansions_integrated.description: Two paragraphs added: (1) e=0.66 is a secondary globe derivative; (2) 14.1% mathematical error in E(0.4356) and no V13 Finsler implementation in dome repo.

integrity_findings.heading_hierarchy: WARN — Killshots tab h1 in source (rendered as tab-section h2 by container). Minor cosmetic issue, no action required.
integrity_findings.notes: No critical or major integrity issues. No rebuild required.

self_apply_summary.notes: EXP-027 had no issue_ids array (NOTE-008 response item), so no issues to close. Expansion tracker updated to 27/27 integrated.

recommended_actions.action: ISS-442: Human editorial decision on 'Misleading' verdict subcategorization. Consider adding 'Non-Discriminating' subcategory or moving non-discriminating WINs to 'Std Model Explains'. Affects 23 WINs. This is the only remaining open issue.
Watch April 9 post-reset-window: dome site may update score, add new WINs, or post Eclipse predictions. Poller will catch it. If score updates appear, analyst should verify against our data.
Analyst: process NOTE-007 (WGS84 dependency audit across all 67 WINs). Complements gravity dependency map. Together they quantify how much of the dome's infrastructure is borrowed from globe models.
Curmudgeon: 11 WINs remaining (WIN-057 through WIN-067). Cycle 2 nearing completion.
